response.overview: Humairah continues the tradition of early marriage in her family. Pak Zali, her father, accepts Datuk Kamarul's proposal to match Humairah with Shahir. Shahir, who is unenthusiastic, agrees to marry Humairah although he has a girlfriend named Camelia. He marries Humairah for his mother's sake. The two of them do not go on a honeymoon; instead, Shahir goes to China for work and brings Camelia along. Humairah becomes pregnant and eventually gives birth to a baby boy named Harith. Saiful, Humairah's former boyfriend and also Shahir's younger brother, returns from London, which makes Shahir jealous. Camelia continues to scheme ways to separate them. Disaster strikes Shahir when he is involved in an accident and becomes paralyzed. CAST
response.title: Semerah Cinta Humairah
